newsSinceJun6: No new fundamental news. Shares fell -15.3% on June 9 as the late-May retail/meme rally unwinds: the spike was triggered by a May 27 post from the 400k-follower X account 'Serenity' (@aleabitoreddit) that drove a 77% intraday surge on ~17x normal volume with multiple volatility halts. Berenberg downgraded to Hold urging profit-taking; only 1 of 8 analysts rate it Buy and consensus PT (~EUR 5.40, recently cut from EUR 6.34 alongside 2026 revenue/EPS estimate cuts) sits far below the EUR 9.16 price even after today's drop. Today's move is flow-driven, not fundamental.

sources.label: Bloomberg: Popular X Account Sparks Massive Rally in Little-Known Chipmaker (May 27, 2026)
TradingView/GuruFocus: X-Fab Shares Jump 77% After Viral AI Chip Trading Post
MarketScreener: X-Fab whipsaws in volatile trading
Simply Wall St: X-FAB forecast/PT revisions (2026 rev cut to $862.9M, PT EUR 6.34 -> EUR 5.40)

verdicts.rankRationale: The name is no longer hidden or under-owned: a viral retail meme rally (17x volume, trading halts) is now unwinding (-15.3% today), and even post-drop the price sits ~70% above the ~EUR 5.40 consensus PT with sell-side cutting 2026 estimates. On an alpha list that penalizes crowding and post-rerating chase, residual alpha has been consumed by flow, not fundamentals.
verdicts.bull: Q1 2026 revenue of $205.8M beat guidance with wide-bandgap/SiC up 152% YoY and medical up 39%; the specialty mixed-signal/SiC foundry thesis for industrial, auto, and data-center power management is intact underneath the noise.
verdicts.neutral: The -15% day is mean reversion of a non-fundamental spike, not new bad news; fair treatment is to mark down the crowding/valuation component while leaving the bottleneck thesis unchanged until Q2 results.
verdicts.bear: The stock remains a retail battleground trading roughly double pre-meme analyst fair value while consensus cut 2026 revenue to ~$863M and EPS to ~$0.26, and auto (its largest end market) fell 10% YoY - the unwind can continue well below EUR 9.
verdicts.primaryCatalyst: Q2 2026 earnings/guidance confirming SiC and data-center power management momentum, or a concrete photonics/power design win that retroactively validates the rerating.
verdicts.primaryRisk: Continued meme unwind toward the ~EUR 5.40 consensus target as retail flow exits, compounded by weak automotive demand and cut 2026 estimates.
